title: sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat
description:
This is a continuation of sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat. In the current window, the SM persona again produced back-to-back failed runs with explicit truncation signatures at 2026-05-29T01:13:38.729082+00:00 and 2026-05-29T01:13:38.754914+00:00. Both failures name `finish_reason=length` and ended in JSON parse errors, matching the already-established factory-side output-cap pattern rather than a story-specific defect.

The immediate downstream impact in this window was limited because the SM recovered on the next attempt at 2026-05-29T01:13:38.776394+00:00. However, the pattern is not resolved: the same failure class has now recurred across multiple summarizer intervals, so the concern is persistence and repeat burn risk rather than a one-off transient. The ambiguous sandbox-style failures on other personas are present in the same window but do not materially change the diagnosis for this concern.

Given the explicit error text and repeated recurrence, the most plausible area remains SM prompt/output sizing or persona-level response shaping. Evidence in this window does not support raising to halt: there is no queue-stall evidence, no sustained tick blockage, and the failing persona recovered quickly. The concern remains operator-actionable because the pattern is clear, repeated, and attributable to factory infrastructure rather than story content.

evidence.summary_excerpt: The previously escalated SM truncation pattern repeated immediately with two more `finish_reason=length` JSON-parse failures before recovering on the next attempt.

evidence.excerpt: persona=sm attempt_n=804 success=false error="json parse failed at max_tokens=65536 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 9 (char 8)" tokens_out=122880 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat

persona=sm attempt_n=805 success=false error="json parse failed at max_tokens=8192 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 7 (char 6)" tokens_out=20 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat
persona=sm attempt_n=806 success=true error=null tokens_in=10 tokens_out=20 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat

{"noteworthy":"Seven failures total: four generic \"tests not green after run\" and one null-error sandbox failure are ambiguous, but two SM failures are clearly diagnosable factory-side truncations (`finish_reason=length`) and repeat the prior escalated pattern."}
{"noteworthy":"Onboarder hit a retry storm with 3 failures in the window, but the errors are mixed/generic and storyless; SM also failed twice in a tight burst with the same truncation class."}

escalation_reason: Repeated SM truncation pattern persists across multiple watcher-note intervals, including two new back-to-back failures at 2026-05-29T01:13:38.729082+00:00 and 2026-05-29T01:13:38.754914+00:00 with explicit `finish_reason=length` JSON-parse errors. L3 judgment is needed because the error class is infrastructure-clear, recurring despite prior escalation, and likely tied to SM output sizing/persona settings.
